description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the cm0x4d/ubuntu-qt5-cmake Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -y and apt-get install -y libsdl2-dev libwayland-dev. Define a single stage called build and a job named job1 in that stage that executes qmake compositor.pro followed by make. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
